prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, financial models, or the ability to predict future stock prices. The confidence intervals are arbitrary small ranges around this current price, incrementally widening for higher confidence levels, and are purely illustrative to fulfill the requested format. They are not based on any financial analysis or predictive model and should not be considered financial advice.
